name: soroe
description: Skills-first agent framework: Design, Build, and Verify skills backed by an offline, deterministic reference-to-interface compiler.

scripts.check: node --check ./bin/soroe.js && node --check ./src/*.js && node ./bin/soroe.js validate ./fixtures/valid/minimal.recipe.json && node ./bin/soroe.js design ./examples/observatory.recipe.json --out ./build/observatory-design && node ./bin/soroe.js build ./build/observatory-design/facet-pack.json --out ./build/observatory-build && node ./bin/soroe.js verify ./build/observatory-build --plan ./build/observatory-build/verification.plan.json
